name: iStat Menus
description: Advanced Mac system monitoring in the menu bar (CPU, memory, disk, network, sensors)

extraction.note: 302 redirect to CDN with versioned filename. Version 6: https://download.bjango.com/istatmenus6/

changelog.note: Version history page with dates in format '14 May 2026'

notes: Sparkle appcast URL is NOT publicly accessible (likely embedded in binary with custom headers). No Cloudflare. Served via nginx + BunnyCDN. Download redirect filename changes per release. Version 6 at download.bjango.com, version 7 at istatmenus.app. Notarized (com.bjango.istatmenus, Team ID Y93TK974AT).
